heading: Usage
body:
```python
from langgraph.checkpoint.mongodb import MongoDBSaver
from pymongo import MongoClient

# Connect to your MongoDB cluster
client = MongoClient("<connection-string>")

# Initialize the MongoDB checkpointer
checkpointer = MongoDBSaver(client)

# Instantiate the graph with the checkpointer
app = graph.compile(checkpointer=checkpointer)
```

> **Note:** 
>
> - [Tutorial](langgraph-short-term-memory)
>
> - [MongoDB Checkpointer Documentation](https://langchain-ai.github.io/langgraph/how-tos/persistence_mongodb/)
>
> - [LangGraph API Reference](https://langchain-mongodb.readthedocs.io/en/latest/langgraph_checkpoint_mongodb/api_docs.html)
